en: For three years Syria and Israel continued without war.
zh: 亞蘭人和以色列人之間，連續三年沒有戰爭。

en: But in the third year Jehoshaphat the king of Judah came down to the king of Israel.
zh: 到了第三年，猶大王約沙法下去見以色列王。

en: And the king of Israel said to his servants, "Do you know that Ramoth-gilead belongs to us, and we keep quiet and do not take it out of the hand of the king of Syria?"
zh: 以色列王對他的臣僕說：“你們知道嗎？基列的拉末原屬於我們，我們怎可靜坐不動，不把它從亞蘭王的手中奪回來呢？”

en: And he said to Jehoshaphat, "Will you go with me to battle at Ramoth-gilead?" And Jehoshaphat said to the king of Israel, "I am as you are, my people as your people, my horses as your horses."
zh: 亞哈問約沙法：“你肯與我一起到基列的拉末去作戰嗎？”約沙法回答以色列王：“你我不分彼此，我的人民就像是你的人民，我的戰馬就像是你的戰馬。”

en: And Jehoshaphat said to the king of Israel, "Inquire first for the word of the LORD."
zh: 約沙法又對以色列王說：“現在請你先求問耶和華。”

en: Then the king of Israel gathered the prophets together, about four hundred men, and said to them, "Shall I go to battle against Ramoth-gilead, or shall I refrain?" And they said, "Go up, for the Lord will give it into the hand of the king."
zh: 於是以色列王把眾先知聚集了來，約有四百人，問他們：“我可以去攻打基列的拉末嗎？或是應當忍耐不去呢？”他們說：“你可以上去，主必把那城交在王的手裡。”

en: But Jehoshaphat said, "Is there not here another prophet of the LORD of whom we may inquire?"
zh: 約沙法說：“這裡不是還有耶和華的先知，我們可以求問他嗎？”

en: And the king of Israel said to Jehoshaphat, "There is yet one man by whom we may inquire of the LORD, Micaiah the son of Imlah, but I hate him, for he never prophesies good concerning me, but evil." And Jehoshaphat said, "Let not the king say so."
zh: 以色列王對約沙法說：“還有一個人，我們可以託他求問耶和華。不過我憎恨他，因為他對我說的預言，都是凶話，不是吉話。這人就是音拉的兒子米該雅。”但約沙法說：“請王不要這麼說。”

en: Then the king of Israel summoned an officer and said, "Bring quickly Micaiah the son of Imlah."
zh: 於是王召了一位太監來，說：“快去把音拉的兒子米該雅召來！”

en: Now the king of Israel and Jehoshaphat the king of Judah were sitting on their thrones, arrayed in their robes, at the threshing floor at the entrance of the gate of Samaria, and all the prophets were prophesying before them.
zh: 以色列王和猶大王約沙法穿著朝服，在撒瑪利亞城門口的廣場上，各人坐在自己的王位上；所有的先知都在他們面前說預言。

en: And Zedekiah the son of Chenaanah made for himself horns of iron and said, "Thus says the LORD, 'With these you shall push the Syrians until they are destroyed.'"
zh: 基拿拿的兒子西底家做了些鐵角，說：“耶和華這樣說：‘你要用這些鐵角牴觸亞蘭人，直到把他們完全消滅。’”

en: And all the prophets prophesied so and said, "Go up to Ramoth-gilead and triumph; the LORD will give it into the hand of the king."
zh: 所有的先知也都這樣預言說：“你可以上基列的拉末去，必得勝利！因為耶和華必把那城交在王的手裡。”

en: And the messenger who went to summon Micaiah said to him, "Behold, the words of the prophets with one accord are favorable to the king. Let your word be like the word of one of them, and speak favorably."
zh: 那去召米該雅的使者對米該雅說：“看哪，這裡的眾先知都異口同聲地對王說吉話，請你與他們一樣說吉話。”

en: But Micaiah said, "As the LORD lives, what the LORD says to me, that I will speak."
zh: 米該雅說：“我指著永活的耶和華起誓，耶和華吩咐我甚麼，我就說甚麼。”

en: And when he had come to the king, the king said to him, "Micaiah, shall we go to Ramoth-gilead to battle, or shall we refrain?" And he answered him, "Go up and triumph; the LORD will give it into the hand of the king."
zh: 米該雅來到王那裡的時候，王就問他：“米該雅啊，我們可以到基列的拉末去作戰嗎？或是要忍耐不去呢？”米該雅回答亞哈：“你可以上去，必得勝利，因為耶和華必把那城交在王的手裡！”

en: But the king said to him, "How many times shall I make you swear that you speak to me nothing but the truth in the name of the LORD?"
zh: 王對他說：“我要囑咐你多少次，你才奉耶和華的名對我只說真話呢？”

en: And he said, "I saw all Israel scattered on the mountains, as sheep that have no shepherd. And the LORD said, 'These have no master; let each return to his home in peace.'"
zh: 米該雅說： “我看見以色列人四散在山上，好像沒有牧人的羊群一樣； 耶和華說：‘這些人沒有主人， 使他們平平安安各自回家吧！’”

en: And the king of Israel said to Jehoshaphat, "Did I not tell you that he would not prophesy good concerning me, but evil?"
zh: 以色列王對約沙法說：“我不是告訴過你，這人對我說的預言，總不說吉話，只說凶話嗎？”

en: And Micaiah said, "Therefore hear the word of the LORD: I saw the LORD sitting on his throne, and all the host of heaven standing beside him on his right hand and on his left;
zh: 米該雅說：“因此，你要聽耶和華的話；我看見耶和華坐在他的寶座上，天上的萬軍都侍立在他的左右。

en: and the LORD said, 'Who will entice Ahab, that he may go up and fall at Ramoth-gilead?' And one said one thing, and another said another.
zh: 耶和華說：‘誰去引誘亞哈，使他上基列的拉末陣亡呢？’有說這樣的，有說那樣的。

en: Then a spirit came forward and stood before the LORD, saying, 'I will entice him.'
zh: 後來有一個靈出來，站在耶和華面前，說：‘我去引誘他。’耶和華問他：‘你用甚麼方法呢？’

en: And the LORD said to him, 'By what means?' And he said, 'I will go out, and will be a lying spirit in the mouth of all his prophets.' And he said, 'You are to entice him, and you shall succeed; go out and do so.'
zh: 他回答：‘我要出去，在亞哈所有先知的口中，作說謊的靈。’耶和華說：‘你可以去引誘他，你也必能成功，你去這樣行吧！’

en: Now therefore behold, the LORD has put a lying spirit in the mouth of all these your prophets; the LORD has declared disaster for you."
zh: 現在，耶和華已經把說謊的靈放在你這些先知的口中，耶和華已經命定災禍臨到你。”

en: Then Zedekiah the son of Chenaanah came near and struck Micaiah on the cheek and said, "How did the Spirit of the LORD go from me to speak to you?"
zh: 基拿拿的兒子西底家近前來，打米該雅的臉頰說：“耶和華的靈怎樣離開了我，去與你說話呢？”

en: And Micaiah said, "Behold, you shall see on that day when you go into an inner chamber to hide yourself."
zh: 米該雅說：“你進密室躲藏的那一天，就必看見了。”

en: And the king of Israel said, "Seize Micaiah, and take him back to Amon the governor of the city and to Joash the king's son,
zh: 以色列王說：“把米該雅帶回去，交給市長亞們和王的兒子約阿施，

en: and say, 'Thus says the king, "Put this fellow in prison and feed him meager rations of bread and water, until I come in peace."'"
zh: 說：‘王這樣吩咐：把這人囚在監裡，少給他食物和水，直到我平平安安回來。’”

en: And Micaiah said, "If you return in peace, the LORD has not spoken by me." And he said, "Hear, all you peoples!"
zh: 米該雅說：“如果你真的可以平平安安回來，那麼耶和華就沒有藉著我說話了。”他又說：“眾民啊，你們都要聽。”

en: So the king of Israel and Jehoshaphat the king of Judah went up to Ramoth-gilead.
zh: 於是，以色列王和猶大王約沙法上基列的拉末去了。

en: And the king of Israel said to Jehoshaphat, "I will disguise myself and go into battle, but you wear your robes." And the king of Israel disguised himself and went into battle.
zh: 以色列王對約沙法說：“我要改裝上戰場去了；你可以仍穿自己的朝服。”於是以色列王改裝到戰場去了。

en: Now the king of Syria had commanded the thirty-two captains of his chariots, "Fight with neither small nor great, but only with the king of Israel."
zh: 亞蘭王曾經囑咐他的三十二個戰車長說：“無論大小將兵，你們都不要與他們爭戰，只要與以色列王爭戰。”

en: And when the captains of the chariots saw Jehoshaphat, they said, "It is surely the king of Israel." So they turned to fight against him. And Jehoshaphat cried out.
zh: 戰車長們看見約沙法的時候，就說：“這人必是以色列王。”他們就轉過去與他爭戰，約沙法便喊叫起來。

en: And when the captains of the chariots saw that it was not the king of Israel, they turned back from pursuing him.
zh: 戰車長們一見他不是以色列王，就轉回來，不追趕他了。

en: But a certain man drew his bow at random and struck the king of Israel between the scale armor and the breastplate. Therefore he said to the driver of his chariot, "Turn around and carry me out of the battle, for I am wounded."
zh: 有一個人隨便射了一箭，竟射中了以色列王鐵甲與護胸甲之間的地方。王對駕車的說：“你把車轉過來，載我離開戰場吧！我受了重傷。”

en: And the battle continued that day, and the king was propped up in his chariot facing the Syrians, until at evening he died. And the blood of the wound flowed into the bottom of the chariot.
zh: 那一天戰爭不斷升級，有人扶著王站在車上抵擋亞蘭人。到了黃昏，王就死了；血從傷口流到戰車的底下去。

en: And about sunset a cry went through the army, "Every man to his city, and every man to his country!"
zh: 約在日落的時候，有命令傳遍軍中說：“各歸各城，各歸各地吧。”

en: So the king died, and was brought to Samaria. And they buried the king in Samaria.
zh: 王死了以後，人們把他送回撒瑪利亞，埋葬在那裡。

en: And they washed the chariot by the pool of Samaria, and the dogs licked up his blood, and the prostitutes washed themselves in it, according to the word of the LORD that he had spoken.
zh: 他們在撒瑪利亞的池旁，妓女洗澡的地方清洗戰車，有狗來舔亞哈的血，正如耶和華說過的話一樣。

en: Now the rest of the acts of Ahab and all that he did, and the ivory house that he built and all the cities that he built, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel?
zh: 亞哈其餘的事蹟，他所作的一切，他建造的象牙宮和他重建的一切城鎮，不是都記在以色列諸王的年代誌上嗎？

en: So Ahab slept with his fathers, and Ahaziah his son reigned in his place.
zh: 亞哈與他的列祖同睡，他的兒子亞哈謝接續他作王。

en: Jehoshaphat the son of Asa began to reign over Judah in the fourth year of Ahab king of Israel.
zh: 以色列王亞哈第四年，亞撒的兒子約沙法登基作猶大王。

en: Jehoshaphat was thirty-five years old when he began to reign, and he reigned twenty-five years in Jerusalem. His mother's name was Azubah the daughter of Shilhi.
zh: 約沙法登基的時候是三十五歲；他在耶路撒冷作王二十五年。他母親名叫阿蘇巴，是示利希的女兒。

en: He walked in all the way of Asa his father. He did not turn aside from it, doing what was right in the sight of the LORD. Yet the high places were not taken away, and the people still sacrificed and made offerings on the high places.
zh: 約沙法遵行他父親亞撒所行的一切，總不偏離，行耶和華看為正的事。只是邱壇還沒有廢去，人民仍在邱壇上獻祭燒香 。

en: Jehoshaphat also made peace with the king of Israel.
zh: 約沙法王與以色列王和平相處。

en: Now the rest of the acts of Jehoshaphat, and his might that he showed, and how he warred, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Judah?
zh: 約沙法其餘的事蹟，他作過的英勇的事和他怎樣爭戰的事，不是都寫在猶大列王的年代誌上嗎？

en: And from the land he exterminated the remnant of the male cult prostitutes who remained in the days of his father Asa.
zh: 約沙法把父親亞撒在世時遺留下來的廟妓都從國中除滅。

en: There was no king in Edom; a deputy was king.
zh: 那時，以東沒有王，由總督統治。

en: Jehoshaphat made ships of Tarshish to go to Ophir for gold, but they did not go, for the ships were wrecked at Ezion-geber.
zh: 約沙法建造了他施船隻，要到俄斐去運金子，可是不能開船，因為船隻在以旬．迦別壞了。

en: Then Ahaziah the son of Ahab said to Jehoshaphat, "Let my servants go with your servants in the ships," but Jehoshaphat was not willing.
zh: 那時亞哈的兒子亞哈謝對約沙法說：“讓我的僕人與你的僕人一同坐船去吧！”但是約沙法不肯。

en: And Jehoshaphat slept with his fathers and was buried with his fathers in the city of David his father, and Jehoram his son reigned in his place.
zh: 約沙法與他的列祖同睡，與他的列祖一同埋葬在他先祖大衛的城裡；他的兒子約蘭接續他作王。

en: Ahaziah the son of Ahab began to reign over Israel in Samaria in the seventeenth year of Jehoshaphat king of Judah, and he reigned two years over Israel.
zh: 猶大王約沙法第十七年，亞哈的兒子亞哈謝在撒瑪利亞登基作以色列王。他作以色列王兩年。

en: He did what was evil in the sight of the LORD and walked in the way of his father and in the way of his mother and in the way of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, who made Israel to sin.
zh: 他行耶和華看為惡的事，行他父親的道和他母親的道，又行尼八的兒子耶羅波安使以色列人陷在罪中的道。

en: He served Baal and worshiped him and provoked the LORD, the God of Israel, to anger in every way that his father had done.
zh: 他事奉巴力，敬拜巴力，照著他父親所行的一切惹耶和華以色列的 神發怒。
